observations: straight_stack is the lowest-complexity case: an identical per-slice analytic baseline with near-zero directional spread.
obstruction_stack is the middle-complexity case: localized turning that persists across slices as the obstruction shifts.
constriction_stack is the highest-complexity case: broader slice-wide turning from the breathing constriction stack.
bounded_critic_summary.recommendation_note: Continue means only that descriptor separation remains stable enough in this bounded multi-slice proxy to justify a later experiment. It does not validate physical realism, 3D TPMS ranking, or TopoStream semantics.

perturbation.note: Deterministic bounded sinusoidal dither applied to fluid cells only. This is a robustness stressor, not a physical noise model.

format_note: This is a bounded comparison across deterministic slice stacks. It is a simple 3D proxy only, not a real-candidate ranking method.
not_proven: Any physical realism for the synthetic slices or the stacked proxy
Any mapping from descriptor separation to hydraulic, thermal, or structural performance
Any equivalence between these descriptors and fluid vortices
Any validated ranking of 3D TPMS coldplate candidates
what_this_is: A stack of 2D slices with controlled variation, encoded slice-by-slice with the existing bridge-local path and aggregated with sandbox-only metrics.
